wellnet.status.player.summary.analyzing: I am still collecting enough data to decide whether the world is stable.
wellnet.status.player.summary.ping: Connection looks %2$s right now: around %1$s ms. Session phase: %3$s.
wellnet.status.player.summary.frame: This world is running in frame-analysis mode: average frame time %1$s ms, spikes %2$s%%, stalls %3$s%%. Session phase: %4$s.
wellnet.status.player.action.analyzing: Current action: waiting before making any changes.
wellnet.status.player.action.idle: Current action: keeping your current settings. Render distance is %1$s.
wellnet.status.player.action.recovering: Current action: slowly restoring render distance from %1$s toward %2$s.
wellnet.status.player.action.protecting: Current action: holding a safer render distance. Current %1$s, temporary target %2$s.
wellnet.status.player.reason.default: Reason: this session is in the %1$s phase, so WellNet is being cautious.
wellnet.status.player.reason.host: Reason: your local world is carrying both the game and the host load, so WellNet is protecting smoothness.
wellnet.status.player.reason.burst: Reason: a short burst of heavy spikes was detected, so WellNet is avoiding chain lag.
wellnet.status.player.reason.frames: Reason: frame spikes suggest the client is under pressure right now.
wellnet.status.player.reason.spikes: Reason: short instability bursts were detected in the session.
wellnet.status.player.reason.traffic: Reason: traffic became too uneven, so WellNet moved into a safer mode.
wellnet.status.player.reason.join: Reason: the world is still loading and WellNet is keeping things conservative for a moment.
wellnet.status.player.reason.recovery: Reason: the session looks healthier again, so WellNet is stepping settings back up.
wellnet.status.player.reason.afk: Reason: you have been inactive for a while, so WellNet is using a lighter profile.
wellnet.status.player.reason.network: Reason: the connection looks less stable than usual, so WellNet is being careful.
wellnet.status.player.footer: Use /wellnet status technical for raw metrics or /wellnet help for a plain-language guide.
wellnet.status.guide.empty: WellNet guide: there is no built-in page for that topic.
